creator: franco@opnsense.org
text:
(In reply to Adam Weinberger from comment #8)

Hi Adam, thanks for committing this.

The revision change was intentional since www/caddy-custom has its own revision and it does not benefit in any way from the revision changes in www/caddy (which can only be build changes done in that directory only).  This is a minor issues that creates spurious updates when caddy was changed, but caddy-custom wasn't.  

We will be looking at the update next week, but it's likely fine. Happy new year!


Cheers,
Franco
